"CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact
An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to large memory usage. This requires extracting the text of a page which contains a form XObject with self-references.

### Patches
This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.12.2](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.12.2).

### Workarounds
If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3805](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3805).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00123, "percentile": 0.02409}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j543-4vmf-qm7v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T13:47:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j543-4vmf-qm7v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j543-4vmf-qm7v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49461"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T13:47:08Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-j543-4vmf-qm7v", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3805", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.12.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j543-4vmf-qm7v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-j543-4vmf-qm7v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Possible large memory usage for form XObjects during text extraction", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T13:47:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j543-4vmf-qm7v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.12.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.12.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Possible large memory usage for form XObjects during text extraction
